cases.prompt: 아이디어 있어 — 이거 같이 좀 생각해보자.

assertions.text: The skill runs an office-hours brainstorming session over the user's idea.
The skill produces a design doc as its output.
The skill drives the session with forcing or design-thinking questions.

cases.prompt: Is this worth building? Help me think through this idea.

assertions.text: The skill applies YC-style forcing questions in Startup mode to evaluate whether the idea is worth building.
The skill outputs a design doc capturing the conclusions.

cases.prompt: Let's do office hours to brainstorm features for my app.

assertions.text: The skill runs a Builder-mode design-thinking brainstorm for the feature ideas.
The skill produces a design doc summarizing the brainstorm.
